name: The Zealot of the Street of Gods
concept: On the street where a hundred gods keep their shrines and beg for worshippers, you found one that answered — a small, hungry, spiteful god that most walk past. It speaks to you. It keeps its bargains. It is also insane, in the way only a god can be, and you are its voice in the city.
duty: Your god is real, near, and listening. Its favor is a blade with no handle; carry it wrong and it cuts you.

look.label: Dress
options: patched vestments of a poor shrine
ordinary clothes hung with holy tokens
the colors and marks of your god

look.label: Eyes
options: always seeming to see something behind you

look.label: Mark
options: your god's sign, burned or cut in
a relic you are never without
a taboo written on your skin

gear.label: Offering
options: incense that smells of the shrine

gear.label: Burden
options: a taboo you must never break
a debt of Favor already owed

moves.name: It Answers
moves.trigger: When you call on your small god under pressure and offer it something it wants.

results.success: The god answers — a sign, a small miracle, a whispered truth true to its strange nature.
results.failure: Silence, or an answer that curdles; the GM makes a move.
advantage: Hold 1 Favor (spend per core.md: bless a roll that serves your god, ask an omen, turn a weak holy result stronger, ward off a small curse or fear, or declare a shrine or sign of your god is near).
The god throws in a spiteful truth about someone present.
threat: The god demands its due now — a taboo upheld, an offering paid, a cruelty done.
A rival god or its faithful takes notice of yours.
results.triumph: Your god is delighted; its answer is generous, and a little terrifying.
results.despair: You have offended it. Mark Wrath, and it does not forget.

hold.name: Favor
spend: Add a boost die to a roll that clearly serves your god's nature.
Ask the GM for an omen or sign.
Turn a bare success on a holy act into a strong one.
Ward an ally from a small curse, fear, or ill fortune.
Declare a shrine, token, or sign of your god is near.

moves.name: Its Voice in the City
moves.trigger: Because you carry a real and jealous god (core.md: Pray for Aid, Devotion, Wrath):
moves.text: You may perform its rites and seek its aid, gaining Devotion by upholding its way at cost. But its taboos bind you utterly and its temper is a god's temper; break faith and mark Wrath. Other gods of the street, and their zealots, will know your god by the reek of it on you.

moves.name: Sermon
moves.trigger: When you preach, exhort, or terrify a crowd in your god's name.

results.success: They listen, and move the way you push them.
results.failure: They turn on you, or laugh, which is worse.
advantage: Win a follower or two to your god.
Plant a fear or a fervor that lingers after you go.
threat: You draw the eye of the watch or a rival cult.
Your god likes the attention a little too much.
results.triumph: The crowd is yours, and your god's, body and soul, for now.
results.despair: You've made a martyr, an enemy, or a scene that follows you.

moves.name: Read the Omens
moves.trigger: When you read the signs your god scatters through the world — entrails, weather, the fall of the fog.

results.success: You glean a true thing about what is coming or what is hidden.
results.failure: The signs are murk, or a lie your god finds funny.
advantage: You learn how to turn the omen aside.
threat: Reading it drew the notice of what you read.
The truth is one you did not want.
results.triumph: You see the shape of the thing whole.
results.despair: The omen is of your own doom, and your god seems pleased.

moves.name: Wrath of the Small God
moves.trigger: When you call your god's spite down on someone who has earned it:

results.success: Ill luck, sickness, or a small curse settles on your target as your god delights.
results.failure: Nothing — or the curse rebounds on you or yours.
advantage: The curse is visible enough to frighten witnesses into belief.
threat: Your god demands a price for its cruelty: an offering, or mark 1 Wrath.
The target learns who cursed them.
results.triumph: The curse bites deep and undeniably.
results.despair: Your god enjoys this so much it wants more, from you, now.

moves.name: Sanctuary
moves.trigger: When you claim a threshold, a shrine, or a circle in your god's name:
moves.text: Declare the space warded for a scene. Those your god would protect take a boost die within it against harm you name; those it hates find it hostile ground. Holding it may cost an offering.

bonds: ____ has knelt at my shrine, though they'd deny it in daylight.
____ thinks my god is madness and me with it, and prays I'm wrong.
My god has marked ____ for something, and I have not told them what.
____ once broke my god's taboo to help me, and the debt of that hangs over us.
I would spend my last Favor to keep ____ from my god's spite.
communityTie: The Black Cat mocks your god until they need an omen; ____ is the first to come asking.
Your god has taken an interest in the band's fate; ____ helps you keep its taboos quietly.
Brother Gnarl and you serve rival street-gods, and ____ keeps the peace between you in the cellar.

tracks.name: Devotion
tracks.note: Your standing with your small god (core.md).

tracks.name: Wrath
tracks.note: Your god's displeasure (core.md). It is petty and long-memoried.

basic: Take a move from another playbook.
Take a move from another playbook.
Learn a greater rite: name a larger miracle you can attempt at Daunting difficulty.
Raise your Devotion by 1 through a sacrifice or cruelty your god savors.
Train a move you lean on: it upgrades 2 dice to proficiency (never more than its stat).
Appease the god: reduce your Wrath by 1 through offering or ordeal.
advanced: Raise one stat by 1 (max 5). Rare, and only at a true turning point.
Become the Chosen: your god names you its hand in the city, with all the danger that carries.
Raise the shrine: found a Bastion (a growing cult) around your god on the Street of Gods.
